_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: We confirmed that Nf1 was eliminated in Nf1 P1 mutants... In both Nf1 P1 mutants and Nf1 RNAi lines, there was an increase in pERK, with no detectable change in total ERK levels
details: Confirmed elimination of Nf1 protein and increased phosphorylated ERK levels with no change in total ERK
